title: vatica umbonata
intro: Vatica umbonata, also known as the Borneo ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. It is a deciduous tree that is native to Borneo and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vatica umbonata include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the tree's bark is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
